name: carbon-design-system
description: Agent skills for using IBM Carbon Design System foundations, product patterns, and official @carbon packages.

interface.shortDescription: Use IBM Carbon with agent-ready skills.
interface.longDescription: A skill pack for agents that need to apply IBM Carbon Design System foundations, follow Carbon product UX patterns, or use official @carbon packages.
defaultPrompt: Use Carbon Foundations to review this interface against IBM Carbon principles.
Use Carbon React to implement this UI with @carbon/react.
Use Carbon Patterns to choose the right product UX pattern.
